MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Text Ruling

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR#11216.

Appellant FREDERICK B. JUDICE appearing on his own behalf, sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Respondent BAE SYSTEMS SAN FRANCISCO SHIP REPAIR, INC.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Appellant FREDERICK B. JUDICE and against Respondent BAE SYSTEMS SAN FRANCISCO SHIP REPAIR, INC. as follows:
Principal $2589.20
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $2589.20

Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To Apr-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
